basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Project Scientist I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University Recruitment 2026: Panjab University has released the official notification for 1 Project Scientist I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph. D in the field of Science OR Master’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university, Experience (One year after Ph.D and Two year after M.Tech/ME) in research and development in Industrial or Academic institutions or Science and Technology organizations. Experience in scientific activities and services with proven knowledge of Intellectual Property Rights, STI Policies & Industry Academia networks for R&D
qualification.details: Project Scientist I: Ph. D in the field of Science OR Master’s degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university. Experience (One year after Ph.D and Two year after M.Tech/ME) in research and development in Industrial or Academic institutions or Science and Technology organizations. Experience in scientific activities and services with proven knowledge of Intellectual Property Rights, STI Policies & Industry Academia networks for R&D.

salary_details.details: Rs. 56,000/- + HRA as applicable Per Month

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://cpr.puchd.ac.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 24-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Panjab University Project Scientist I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Panjab University Project Scientist I recruitment is 24th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Scientist I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in Science or a Master's degree in Engineering or Technology from a recognized university, along with relevant research experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Scientist I position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Scientist I post is 35 years. Age relaxation details are usually provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Scientist I position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 56,000/- plus applicable HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Panjab University Project Scientist I recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Scientist I post?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Project Scientist I post is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will contain all detailed information.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of Panjab University for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for this recruitment, where you can find the application form and further details, is https://cpr.puchd.ac.in/.
